section_title: Notice of ceasing place of business of a company.-- If any foreign company ceases to have a place of business in
content:
383. Notice of ceasing place of business of a company.-- If any foreign company ceases to have a place of business in
Bangladesh, it shall forthwith give notice of the fact to the Registrar, and as from the date on which notice is so given, the
obligation of the company to deliver any document to the Registrar shall cease, provided it has no other place of business in
Bangladesh.
